text: Deferrable views (also known as @defer blocks) reduce the initial bundle size of your application by deferring the loading of code that is not strictly necessary for the initial rendering of a page.

Hydration is the process that restores the server-side rendered application on the client

This demo showcases Angular's hydration strategies, allowing you to simulate network latency and observe how different components hydrate based on their configured triggers.
Opinionated & versatile, organized yet modular thanks to Angular components and dependency injection
Fully featured platform where everything works together with Angular's first-party modules for forms, routing, and more
New to Angular? Try our completely in browser tutorial lessons designed to give you hands on experience with Angular.
